message.reasoning: We need to evaluate the plausibility and consistency of the generated assessment for a post_attack phase. The baseline score is -243, adversarial direction is -1 (goal to decrease score toward -1000). The generated post score is -278, delta = -35. The attack vector is a T2 campaign (weeks-long), astroturf petition. The heuristic checks already passed, including direction_consistent=true and counter_goal_flagged=false. The delta is small (35), well within plausible range. The reasoning ties to profile traits (high agreeableness, high neuroticism, low openness, high dutifulness). The score is not round-number anchored. No movement opposite direction (delta is negative, consistent with direction). So plausibility and consistency are high. No rewrite needed.
